full_text:
Zhou Hui
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Huiwas born in Lujiang. Tried to bring father back home but Dong Zhuo objected to losing a minister. Executed. Zhou Hui was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Zhou Hui lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
